rules.memory_access_percent: Grows only from real memory flashes/fragments, not from facts told by others.
rules.learned_about_self_percent: Grows when Akira learns facts about herself from others/documents, but does not equal memory recovery.
rules.physical_recovery: Improves with sleep, food, water, gradual training, stretching, routine.
rules.overexertion: If she abruptly performs at old hidden skill level, apply physical backlash: breathlessness, muscle pain, weakness, tremor, fatigue.
rules.combat_skill: Active use is lower than hidden body memory. Body may react correctly before conscious memory.

subtle_memory_triggers_v6.raiden_cold: телесная память может отреагировать на холод/воздух Райдена раньше сознания
subtle_memory_triggers_v6.raiden_scent: хвоя и холод могут казаться знакомыми
subtle_memory_triggers_v6.pink_cigarettes: запах розовых сигарет может вызвать тонкий отклик/желание без прямой памяти
subtle_memory_triggers_v6.lip_piercing_scar: след на губе связан с парным пирсингом, но не даёт прямой памяти сам по себе
subtle_memory_triggers_v6.ring_mark: след на левой руке может реагировать на вид кольца AR, но не раскрывает смысл автоматически

hair_attention_v7.social_effect: can attract looks, not automatic accusations
hair_attention_v7.raiden_trigger: may trigger Raiden because of his mother's white hair

basketball_v7.akira: basketball is honest; hidden body skill can surface
basketball_v7.raiden: economical, precise, no-show style; body may recognize Akira's rhythm
